text: Where are the restrooms? Restrooms are located near each gate: Restroom_1 near Gate A, Restroom_2 near Gate B, Restroom_3 near Gate C, Restroom_4 near Gate D.

Where can I buy food? Concessions are located near each gate: Concession_1 (Hot Dogs) near Gate A, Concession_2 (Beverages) near Gate B, Concession_3 (Snacks) near Gate C, Concession_4 (Merchandise) near Gate D.
Where is medical assistance? Medical tents are located near Gate A (Medical_1) and Gate C (Medical_2).
What sections are available? Lower bowl sections 101-104 and upper bowl sections 201-204.
The stadium has four gates: A (North), B (East), C (South), D (West). Each gate has nearby concessions, restrooms, and medical aid.
Where is the wheelchair access? Wheelchair accessible routes and elevators are located at Gate B and Gate D. Sensory rooms are located near Section 102.
Where can I find public transit or shuttles? Shuttle bus drop-offs are near Gate A. Public transit stations are outside Gate C.
Where are the recycling bins or water stations? Water refill stations and recycling bins are located next to every restroom and concession stand as part of our sustainability initiative.
